title: sedum atlanticum
intro: Sedum atlanticum, also known as the Atlantic stonecrop, is a species of succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sedum atlanticum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Sedum atlanticum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat various health conditions.
